goal: Add a side-effect-free permit issue preflight builder for approved cockpit patch authority decisions while keeping permit issuance, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, renderer changes, runtime, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not issue permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Approved cockpit authority decisions can be preflighted for permit issue without issuing a permit.
Preflight, issuer, and issue policy refs are required.
assumptions: Actual permit issuance requires a later task lock.
dod: Ready, missing preflight ref, and rejected decision cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit issuance, server mutation, route mutation, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-103 approved cockpit authority decisions without issuing a permit.
